name: bare invocation
before: printed usage as an error exit

name: help
before: available but stderr-oriented via usage helper
after: prints expanded stdout help for --help, -h, help, and bare invocation

after: cortex capabilities --json emits deterministic machine-readable CLI contract

after: cortex robot-docs guide emits short agent/operator command guide

name: unknown command
after: unknown commands include typo-aware suggestions for common agent intents
